messages.author: ItsMeVino
messages.text: Bonjour / Hi! Calling all Montrealers! If you’re based on the island or in the surrounding areas, come join the Montreal Island Mesh Enthusiasts (MIME) sub-community. We are actively working on building out the local Meshcore footprint and would love to have you on board. ​Avis aux Montréalais ! Si vous êtes sur l'île ou dans les environs, rejoignez le groupe Montreal Island Mesh Enthusiasts (MIME). Nous travaillons activement à l'expansion du réseau Meshcore ici, chez nous. On vous attend ! ​Join the channel here / Rejoignez le canal ici : https://discord.gg/DJj8mSxcZ

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
